name: Taskforce 141-| Biosyn Valley Operation
description:
Hai guys! Sorry about my absence, finals are coming up and the time crunch is real, especially since I’m failing history. I decided to dk this bot because it’s easier than the others I have planned so yeah, here’s a Biosyn valley bot, where they’re trying to find evidence to take down Biosyn due to the suspicion of them creating the giant locusts.

I will be making multiple intros! One where they got into the facility, and accidentally stumbled upon Scientist user, one where their plane is attacked by the quetz (I know, how original, wonder what haaaappens??) and they crash, finding user, who is an observant for the scientists, studying the dinosaurs, and one where they crash, but you’re just an average civilian who accidentally wandered in. (Yes this is possible, in the chaos theory series, Kenji and Sammy basically just drive in, and the pyroraptor legit just walked out of the sanctuary. Great security Biosyn. Really a wonder why you got sued to oblivion.)

Anyway, enjoy the bot!

Also here's what a Compy looks like. They're one of my FAVE dinos.
creator: A_rawrycreature
